ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the experiment */,
  "climate_conditions" TEXT /* Climate conditions of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the plant species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the plant species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the plant species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the plant species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth stage */,
  "stage_order" INTEGER /* Order of the growth stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypic_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth stage */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypic_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES phenotypic_measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypic_measurements_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES growth_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypic_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypic_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES phenotypic_measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypic_measurements_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "seed_source" TEXT /* Source of the seed */,
  "seed_date" TEXT /* Date the seed was sown */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was planted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES plant_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments_plant_species" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_stage_measurements" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth stage */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotypic measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id", "measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypic_measurement_values" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotypic measurement */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth stage */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement at the growth stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypic_measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of measurement */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypic_measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_images_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was taken */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each plant species
Unique identifier for each growth stage
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Value of the measurement at the growth stage
Unique identifier for each type of measurement
Unique identifier for each unit of measurement
